name: avfs-inspector
description: Web-based desktop dashboard for the AVFS agent virtual file system

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @avfs/shared && npm run build --workspace @avfs/server && npm run build --workspace @avfs/web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace @avfs/server" "npm run dev --workspace @avfs/web"
